title: Shipping API Dojo v2: A Foundation for Randomized Learning at Scale
summary: The massive v2 rebuild of Shipping API Dojo introduces content families, seeded randomization, and a full auth/billing foundation. Here's the architecture and vision behind the 20/20/20 curriculum expansion.
body: # Shipping API Dojo v2: A Foundation for Randomized Learning at Scale
heroImageAlt: A clean architectural diagram showing the v2 stack with TanStack Start, Neon Postgres, Better Auth, Creem billing, and content-family data models
author: Nicolas Brulay
